news_items.headline: Brewers' Murphy set to have hip, back surgeries
news_items.summary: Brewers manager Pat Murphy said Saturday he's planning to have back surgery on Thursday, when the team is off, and a procedure on his hip during the All-Star break.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Verlander (hamstring) likely out 'weeks'
news_items.summary: Tigers veteran right-hander Justin Verlander has a left hamstring strain and likely will be out "weeks," according to manager A.J. Hinch.

news_items.headline: Marlins' Hicks scratched due to back tightness
news_items.summary: Marlins slugger Liam Hicks was scratched for their game against the San Francisco Giants on Saturday because of back tightness.

news_items.headline: Red Sox place Kiner-Falefa (forearm) on IL
news_items.summary: The Red Sox placed utility infielder Isiah Kiner-Falefa on the injured list Saturday with left forearm inflammation.

news_items.headline: Nats' Young exits after crashing into outfield wal...
news_items.summary: The Nationals' Jacob Young hit the left-center field wall hard with his right shoulder and head in the eighth inning and had to leave Saturday's game against the Rays.

news_items.headline: Rangers scratch Eovaldi due to knee soreness
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Nathan Eovaldi was scratched from his scheduled start against the Padres because of left knee soreness.

news_items.headline: Cubs' Palencia diagnosed with mild flexor strain
news_items.summary: Cubs closer Daniel Palencia has been diagnosed with a mild flexor strain in his right arm, manager Craig Counsell announced.

news_items.headline: RHP Misiorowski hits 104.2 mph in Brewers' loss
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski had another strong outing against the Braves, topping out at 104.2 mph, but it may not have been strong enough during a 3-2 loss.

news_items.headline: Yankees send down catcher J.C. Escarra; Austin Wells set to return
news_items.summary: With Wells due back on Sunday, the Yankees opted to keep Sánchez over Escarra.

news_items.headline: St. Louis Cardinals are Transitioning into Time of Greater Expectations
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals felt like a team with nothing to lose when the 2026 season began, but an unexpectedly strong start has now vaulted them into a time where there suddenly seems to be greater expectations of what they can achieve. How they deal with this will tell us a lot about what kind […]

news_items.headline: Yankees option Jake Bird, J.C. Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre
news_items.summary: The Yankees optioned right-hander Jake Bird and catcher J.C. Escarra to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre.

news_items.headline: SB Nation Reacts Results: Medic!
news_items.summary: Welcome to SB Nation Reacts, a survey of fans across the MLB. Throughout the year we ask questions of the most plugged-in Arizona Diamondbacks fans and fans across the country. Sign up here to participate in the weekly emailed surveys. Yeah, it’s probably my fault. When I asked this question, I wrote “Through the early […]

news_items.headline: Yankees starting Elmer Rodriguez in Sunday's series finale with Reds, bumping Gerrit Cole's start to Monday
news_items.summary: The New York Yankees made a change to their starting rotation as they finish this weekend's series.
